raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The proposed funding will support the development of over 3.8 million small businesses in California and over 6.8 million workers they employ in the state.",
    "The proposal will fund business counseling, training, and services to help small businesses access capital, reach customers, and navigate government procurement.",
    "Quirk-Silva proposed new state funding to support a network of over 70 small business technical assistance centers.",
    "These funds could help leverage over $30 million in federal funds and reach over 60,000 businesses.",
    "Programs funded will be available to all small businesses, including services tailored for veterans, women, and rural communities."
  ]
}
```
